mapper.sql: MENU_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_URL, ICON, PARENT_ID, FUN_ID, SORT_NUM, LEVEL_NUM, DELETED, CREATED_BY, CREATED_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATED_DATE

choose.when: select m.MENU_ID, m.MENU_NAME, m.ROUTE_ID, r.ROUTE_URL,m.ICON, m.PARENT_ID, m.BUSINESS,m.SORT_NUM, m.LEVEL_NUM, m.DELETED, (select case when srm.operation is NULL THEN 0 else srm.operation end) AS operation, (select CASE COUNT(1) WHEN 0 THEN 'open' ELSE 'close' END from sys_menu where parent_id = m.menu_id and deleted = 0) as state, #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} as USER_ID from sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_route r ON m.ROUTE_ID = r.ROUTE_ID INNER JOIN sys_role_menu srm ON srm.MENU_ID = m.MENU_ID INNER JOIN sys_role_user sru ON srm.ROLE_ID = sru.ROLE_ID AND sru.USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} where m.deleted = 0 AND m.PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY m.sort_num ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT o.MENU_ID, o.MENU_NAME, o.ROUTE_ID,t.route_url, o.ICON, o.PARENT_ID, o.BUSINESS, o.SORT_NUM, o.LEVEL_NUM, o.DELETED,1 AS operation, (select CASE COUNT(1) WHEN 0 THEN 'open' ELSE 'close' END from sys_menu where parent_id = o.menu_id and deleted = 0) as state, #{userId} as USER_ID FROM sys_menu o left join sys_route t on o.route_id = t.route_id WHERE o.DELETED = 0 AND o.PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} order by o.sort_num asc

choose.when: SELECT f.fun_id,f.fun_name,f.fun_code,f.fun_type,su.URL_PATTERN, (select case when srf.operation is NULL THEN 0 else srf.operation end) as OPERATION FROM sys_fun f inner JOIN sys_role_fun srf ON srf.FUN_ID = f.FUN_ID inner JOIN sys_role_user sru ON srf.ROLE_ID = sru.ROLE_ID AND sru.USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} LEFT JOIN sys_url su ON su.URL_ID = f.URL_ID where f.route_id = #{routeId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and f.deleted = 0
choose.otherwise: SELECT f.fun_id,f.fun_name,f.fun_code,f.fun_type,su.URL_PATTERN,1 AS OPERATION FROM sys_fun f LEFT JOIN sys_url su ON su.URL_ID = f.URL_ID where f.route_id = #{routeId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and f.deleted = 0

mapper.select: SELECT o.MENU_ID, o.MENU_NAME, o.ROUTE_ID,t.route_url, o.ICON, o.PARENT_ID, o.BUSINESS, o.SORT_NUM, o.LEVEL_NUM, o.DELETED,1 AS operation, (select CASE COUNT(1) WHEN 0 THEN 'open' ELSE 'close' END from sys_menu where parent_id = o.menu_id and deleted = 0) as state FROM sys_menu o left join sys_route t on o.route_id = t.route_id WHERE o.DELETED = 0 AND o.PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} order by o.sort_num asc

SELECT f.fun_id,f.fun_name,f.fun_code,f.fun_type,su.URL_PATTERN,1 AS OPERATION FROM sys_fun f LEFT JOIN sys_url su ON su.URL_ID = f.URL_ID where f.route_id = #{routeId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and f.deleted = 0

select m.MENU_ID, m.MENU_NAME, m.ROUTE_ID, r.ROUTE_URL,m.ICON, m.PARENT_ID, m.BUSINESS,m.SORT_NUM, m.LEVEL_NUM, m.DELETED,svmf.operation, (select CASE COUNT(1) WHEN 0 THEN 'open' ELSE 'close' END from sys_menu where parent_id = m.menu_id and deleted = 0) as state from sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_route r ON m.ROUTE_ID = r.ROUTE_ID RIGHT JOIN sys_visitor_menu_fun svmf ON m.menu_id = svmf.menu_id AND svmf.type = 1 where m.deleted = 0 AND m.PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY m.sort_num ASC

SELECT f.fun_id,f.fun_name,f.fun_code,f.fun_type,su.URL_PATTERN,svmf.OPERATION FROM sys_fun f LEFT JOIN sys_url su ON su.URL_ID = f.URL_ID RIGHT JOIN sys_visitor_menu_fun svmf ON svmf.fun_id = f.fun_id AND svmf.type = 2 WHERE f.route_id = #{routeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT o.MENU_ID, o.MENU_NAME, o.ROUTE_ID,t.route_url, o.ICON, o.PARENT_ID, o.BUSINESS, o.SORT_NUM, o.LEVEL_NUM, o.DELETED,#{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER} as ROLE_ID, (select case when srm.operation is NULL THEN 0 else srm.operation end) as OPERATION, (select CASE COUNT(1) WHEN 0 THEN 'open' ELSE 'close' END from sys_menu where parent_id = o.menu_id and deleted = 0) as state FROM sys_menu o left join sys_route t on o.route_id = t.route_id left join sys_role_menu srm on srm.menu_id = o.menu_id and srm.role_id = #{roleId,jdbcType = NUMERIC} WHERE o.DELETED = 0 AND o.PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} order by o.sort_num asc

select sf.fun_id,sf.fun_name,sf.fun_code,sf.fun_type,su.url_pattern, (select case when srf.operation is NULL THEN 0 else srf.operation end) as operation from sys_fun sf left join sys_role_fun srf on sf.fun_id = srf.fun_id and srf.role_id = #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER} LEFT JOIN sys_url su ON su.URL_ID = sf.URL_ID where sf.route_id = #{routeId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and sf.deleted = 0

choose.when: SELECT m.*,m.menu_id as menuId,#{userId} AS userId FROM sys_menu m WHERE m.`PARENT_ID`=#{parentId} AND m.menu_id IN (SELECT f.fun_id FROM sys_role_user u, sys_role_fun f WHERE u.role_id = f.role_id AND u.user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) order by m.sort_num asc
choose.otherwise: SELECT m.*,m.menu_id as menuId,#{userId} AS userId FROM sys_menu m WHERE m.`PARENT_ID`=#{parentId} order by m.sort_num asc

mapper.select: SELECT m.*,m.route_id,r.route_url,m.MENU_ID as menuId,#{userId} as userId FROM sys_menu m,sys_route r WHERE m.`PARENT_ID`=#{parentId} and m.route_id=r.route_id and m.deleted = 0 order by m.SORT_NUM asc
mapper.update: update sys_menu set MENU_NAME = #{menuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROUTE_ID = #{routeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ICON = #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, BUSINESS = #{business,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, LEVEL_NUM = #{levelNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, LAST_UPDATED_DATE = #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where MENU_ID = #{menuId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

UPDATE sys_menu SET LEVEL_NUM = #{levelNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_DATE = #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: select sm.MENU_NAME as parentName,sm.PARENT_ID as parentId,t.menu_name as menuName,t.menu_id as menuId from sys_menu sm right join (select t.PARENT_ID,t.MENU_NAME ,t.menu_id from sys_menu t LEFT JOIN sys_route r on t.route_id = r.route_id WHERE ( r.ROUTE_URL=#{menuUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR} or replace(r.ROUTE_URL,'/','')=#{menuUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and t.DELETED=0 limit 1) t on sm.MENU_ID=t.PARENT_ID
